sections.title: What is a payment receipt?
sections.body: A payment receipt is a document a seller issues to confirm that a payment has been received against an invoice or sale. It states the amount paid, the date, the payment method and the invoice it applies to. Unlike an invoice, which requests payment, a receipt acknowledges that payment has been made, giving the customer proof and you a clean record.

sections.title: Receive, receipt, reconcile
sections.body: Paper & Pen issues receipts automatically when payments are recorded, so your invoices and books stay in step.
items: Record a payment against an invoice, full or partial
A receipt is generated with the amount, date and method
The invoice balance and status update automatically
Send the receipt by WhatsApp or email instantly
Online payments record and reconcile themselves

sections.title: Receipt or invoice?
sections.body: An invoice is a request for payment, issued before money changes hands. A receipt is confirmation of payment, issued after. A single invoice can have several receipts if the customer pays in instalments. Paper & Pen tracks each payment against the invoice and issues a receipt every time, so partial payments are never lost.

faqs.q: What is the difference between a receipt and an invoice?
faqs.a: An invoice requests payment before money is paid. A receipt confirms payment after it is received. One invoice can have multiple receipts for instalment payments.
Yes. Creating, sending and tracking payment receipts is free forever on Paper & Pen.

faqs.q: Can I issue a receipt for a partial payment?
faqs.a: Yes. Record any amount against an invoice and a receipt is issued for that payment, with the remaining balance tracked automatically.

faqs.q: Does an online payment create a receipt?
faqs.a: Yes. When a customer pays online, the payment records against the invoice and a receipt is generated and can be sent automatically.

faqs.q: Can I send a receipt over WhatsApp?
faqs.a: Yes. Share the receipt as a link or PDF by WhatsApp or email so the customer has instant proof of payment.
